nasb.text: But I have written very boldly to you on some points so as to remind you again, because of the grace that was given me from God,

esv.text: But on some points I have written to you very boldly by way of reminder, because of the grace given me by God

cnv.text: 但有些地方，我寫得稍為大膽一點，是要提醒你們；我因著　神賜給我的恩典，

ccb.text: 但我仍放胆写信提醒你们几件事，因为我蒙上帝赐恩，

csbs.text: 不过我要提醒你们，藉着神所赐给我的恩典，我在部分地方写得比较大胆。
